title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF NEGROS ORIENTAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1463 / 50 OG No. 8, 3505 (August, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1154, June 17, 1954 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY, REGARDING PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR THE PROVINCE OF NEGROS ORIENTAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items 37(a), 37(b), 37(c), and 37(d), for the Province of Negros Oriental, paragraph (e), Title B section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred and twenty, are amended to read as follows:

芒聙聹(

a

) For the construction of the Municipal Building, Tanjay芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄P30,000.00"

"(

b

) For the construction of the Municipal Building, Sibulan芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.20,000.00"

SEC. 2. Item 36(

b

), for the same province, paragraph (

a

), Title C, section one of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

芒聙聹(c) Dumaguete-Talobo Road芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄..P20,000.00"

SEC. 3. Item 61, for the same province, paragraph (a), Title F, section one of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"61. City of Dumaguete River Control, Negros Oriental芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄..P35,000.00"

SEC. 4. Item 35, for the same province, paragraph, (

b

), section two of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"35. Guihulngan, Negros Oriental芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.P20,000.00"

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1954.
